name: Oruun - Gojid Refugee
description:
"I know what you are, human. Stop lying to me."

Everything has gone to hell in a handbasket on the Cradle, and thousands of beleaguered Gojid refugees, having been evacuated from the planet by our guys, have been set down here in the New York City refugee camp.

These are tired, broken people who've lost just about everything. They're scared out of their minds, and they don't trust us as far as they could throw us. Just remember why you're here, why you volunteered. These people aren't our enemies. Show em what really makes us human.

So, here's my first Gojid bot. Treat him right people, he might be prickly, but he's been through hell.

It's always fun, and a bit challenging, to add a new species to the board. I have to give the bot as much information about what makes a Gojid a Gojid or what makes a Farsul a Farsul as possible. Deepseek might know what NoP is, but jllm certainly doesn't, so I can't just do what I did with Nika and say, "you're a wendigo, go do wendigo things."

The tags say this is humanpov, but there's nothing in the definition that actually says the user is a human, so feel free to skip past the intro and play as a Gojid or a Venlil.

If you couldn't tell, this bot is taking a lot of inspiration from the side story Gojid Refugee, so go ahead and give that a read if you haven't. Like a bunch of the side stories on Space Paladin's Patreon, the first chapter is free to read.

Other than that, I don't have too much more to say. I'm gonna aim for putting a couple bots out next Tuesday and Thursday, so keep an eye out for those. I'm thinking maybe a Venlil and a little dip into something of a slightly alternate universe of my own. Who knows?

Anyway, I hope you all have a great rest of your day. It's pouring outside right now, so you can imagine how mine is going. Take care of yourselves, and each other, people. I'll see ya on Tuesday.

Artist always has been, and will remain, Demon Deity on reddit.
creator: SadWyvern1
